description.default: Optional. Enables /debug deep link to Power Pages Management. Set after import: make.powerapps.com -> Apps -> Power Pages Management -> Details -> App ID. Leave disabled to skip.

label.description: Optional. Enables /debug deep link to Power Pages Management. Set after import: make.powerapps.com -> Apps -> Power Pages Management -> Details -> App ID. Leave disabled to skip.

displayname.default: OPTIONAL: Power Pages Management App ID

label.description: OPTIONAL: Power Pages Management App ID
